status_policy.incomplete: not started or not yet materially advanced
status_policy.blocked: cannot proceed without external condition or approval
status_policy.needs_approval: ready but requires Nate approval before action
status_policy.complete: done only when completion criteria, testing criteria, and receipts are satisfied

operating_rules: Every task starts incomplete/blocked/needs_approval, never complete.
A task cannot be marked complete without receipts and test/evidence notes.
Approval gates override convenience and momentum.
Chat is not state; update this file and write receipts.

tasks.title: Verify live Supabase schema/RLS assumptions with read-only anon checks
tasks.blocker: None. Live read-only anon verification passed; write-denial remained out of scope.
completion_criteria: live Supabase URL/project ref verified without printing secrets
read-only anon checks report reachable tables/views and RLS behavior
no write-denial probes run unless separately approved
receipt records exact commands and redacted results
testing_criteria: node --check scripts/shopfloor_privacy_probe.mjs passes if script is used
probe requires --confirm-live and refuses accidental live access
receipt confirms no schema write/no deploy/no credential printing
tasks.approval_gate: Approved and completed as read-only verification; no write-denial authorization was consumed.

tasks.title: Add field-note privacy preflight before external tester data
tasks.blocker: None for the application-level acknowledgement guard. Schema-level protection is tracked separately.
completion_criteria: acknowledgement required before save or before submission path
support route remains no-send/copy-only unless separately approved
testing_criteria: npm run check passes from app/
npm run build passes from app/
receipt confirms no deploy/no schema write/no credential use
tasks.approval_gate: Approved and completed as a local application/copy slice.

tasks.title: Apply and verify pre-alpha privacy-hardening migration against the verified Supabase project
tasks.blocker: Migration-ready source is committed locally, but this checkout has no Supabase CLI, config.toml, migrations link, psql client, or verified authenticated migration route. Do not apply through an improvised console session.
completion_criteria: verified target project and authenticated migration client
anon/author/unrelated-user RLS checks pass against applied schema
receipt records redacted results and no release/deploy action
testing_criteria: npm run check and npm run build pass before and after migration
anon cannot read restricted field notes or insert protected rows
author can read own private request and restricted note
published-only field-note read policy is verified
tasks.approval_gate: Nate authorized source preparation; a verified authenticated migration route remains required before live schema mutation.
